2604.10386.title: TrajOnco: a multi-agent framework for temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHR for multi-cancer early detection
2604.10386.paper_summary: Accurate estimation of cancer risk from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) could support earlier detection and improved care, but modeling such complex patient trajectories remains challenging. We present TrajOnco, a training-free, multi-agent large language model (LLM) framework designed for scalable multi-cancer early detection. Using a chain-of-agents architecture with long-term memory, TrajOnco performs temporal reasoning over sequential clinical events to generate patient-level summaries, evidence-linked rationales, and predicted risk scores. We evaluated TrajOnco on de-identified Truveta EHR data across 15 cancer types using matched case-control cohorts, predicting risk of cancer diagnosis at 1 year. In zero-shot evaluation, TrajOnco achieved AUROCs of 0.64-0.80, performing comparably to supervised machine learning in a lung cancer benchmark while demonstrating better temporal reasoning than single-agent LLMs. The multi-agent design also enabled effective temporal reasoning with smaller-capacity models such as GPT-4.1-mini. The fidelity of TrajOnco's output was validated through human evaluation. Furthermore, TrajOnco's interpretable reasoning outputs can be aggregated to reveal population-level risk patterns that align with established clinical knowledge. These findings highlight the potential of multi-agent LLMs to execute interpretable temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHRs, advancing both scalable multi-cancer early detection and clinical insight generation.
2604.10386.paper_summary_zh: 準確估算來自長期電子健康紀錄（EHRs）的癌症風險可以支持早期檢測和改善護理，但建模如此複雜的患者軌跡仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>我們提出了TrajOnco，一個無需訓練的多代理大型語言模型（LLM）框架，旨在實現可擴展的多癌症早期檢測。<lb/>使用具有長期記憶的代理鏈架構，TrajOnco對連續的臨床事件進行時間推理，以生成患者級別的摘要、證據連結的理由和預測的風險分數。<lb/>我們在15種癌症類型的去識別化Truveta EHR數據上評估了TrajOnco，使用匹配的病例對照隊列，預測1年內癌症診斷的風險。<lb/>在零樣本評估中，TrajOnco達到了0.64-0.80的AUROC，與肺癌基準中的監督式機器學習表現相當，同時在時間推理方面表現優於單代理LLM。<lb/>多代理設計還使得與小容量模型（如GPT-4.1-mini）進行有效的時間推理成為可能。<lb/>TrajOnco輸出的真實性通過人類評估得到了驗證。<lb/>此外，TrajOnco的可解釋推理輸出可以被聚合，以揭示與既定臨床知識相符的人口級風險模式。<lb/>這些發現突顯了多代理LLM在長期EHR上執行可解釋時間推理的潛力，推進了可擴展的多癌症早期檢測和臨床洞察生成。
2604.10386.author: Sihang Zeng et.al.
2604.10386.authors: Sihang Zeng, Young Won Kim, Wilson Lau, Ehsan Alipour, Ruth Etzioni, Meliha Yetisgen, Anand Oka
